prompt: Describe a thunderstorm. No sentence may contain more than 5 words. Keep every sentence to 5 words or fewer.
response:
Dark clouds gather overhead.
Air grows heavy, electric.
Wind stiffens through trees.
Lightning splits the sky.
Thunder follows, deep and rolling.
Rain lashes roofs and roads.
Windows rattle under sudden gusts.
The world flashes, then booms.
Puddles spread across pavement.
The storm passes slowly onward.
